title: Yellow Belly Snakes x 13 - Retro Sweets - Traditional Jelly Snakes Approx 500g - Nostalgic Yellow Bellies - 13 Soft, Gummy Sweets
features: GIANT SNAKES SWEETS - Transport yourself back to sweet shop memories with these delightfully stretchy yellow belly sweets snakes. Each of the chewy, snake sweets delivers that classic taste that made these retro favourites a playground sensation

GIANT SNAKE SWEETS - Your pack includes 13 giant gummy sweets that are brilliant for sharing at parties or movie nights. These impressive gummy snakes will delight guests at any gathering, big or small

STRETCHY FUN - Watch faces light up as these massive sweet snakes stretch to remarkable lengths without snapping. Their uniquely elastic texture makes every bite an entertaining moment you'll want to share with friends

OLD SCHOOL SWEETS UK - Savour that unmistakable gummies sweets and tangy taste that's delighted sweet lovers for generations. Each snake provides an ideal balance of chewy texture and fruity flavour in every bite

GENEROUS SIZING - With approximately 500g of sweet shop magic in every pack, these giant sweets offer excellent value. Share them with friends or keep them handy for when sugar cravings strike and indulge away
description: Product description Retro Sweet Shop Favourites Indulge in the nostalgic taste of classic Yellow Belly Snake sweets. These old school sweets are ideal for anyone who loves traditional pick and mix treats. Each pack contains 13 gummy snakes (approx 500g) of stretchy, chewy goodness that'll transport you straight back to the sweet shops of yesteryear. Share them with friends or keep them all to yourself - we won't judge! Bulk Buy Brilliance Stock up on these beloved retro sweets without breaking the bank. Our pack of 13 Yellow Belly Snakes offers great value for sweet lovers looking to buy sweets in bulk cheap. Great for parties, movie nights, or filling up your treat drawer. These gummy sweets are individually wrapped to maintain freshness and make sharing easy. A classic British sweet that never goes out of style. Sweet Memories in Every Bite Remember those childhood trips to the sweet shop? These Yellow Belly Snakes are straight from the golden age of traditional UK confectionery. Each chewy snake delivers that retro sweet taste you've been craving. Whether you're introducing them to a new generation or treating yourself to a nostalgic nibble, these classic gummies are sure to bring a smile to your face. -Chewy jelly snake sweets -Traditional retro sweet shop favourite -Yellow banana flavoured -Pack of 13 snakes -Great party bag filler Ingredients Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Gelatine, Humectant (Sorbitols), Modified Potato Starch, Citric Acid, Fruit and Vegetable Concentrates (Lemon, Safflower, Radish, Tomato, Apple, Pumpkin, Carrot, Blackcurrant), Flavourings, Vegetable Oils (Coconut, Palm Kernel), Glazing Agents (Beeswax, Carnauba Wax), Colours (E100, E120, E133, E160a, E160c). Directions Open carefully, share with others, consume in small quantities, store for later use. Individually wrapped for freshness and easy sharing. May pose a choking hazard for young children.
